sys_ws_operation.name: Validate Entity Details

sys_update_version.name: sys_ws_operation_d269daee933f3610dd07fd10ed03d6a3
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ws_operation"><sys_ws_operation action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><consumes>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</consumes><consumes_customized>false</consumes_customized><default_operation_uri/><enforce_acl/><http_method>POST</http_method><name>Validate Entity Details</name><operation_script><![CDATA[(function process(/*RESTAPIRequest*/ request, /*RESTAPIResponse*/ response) {
    var result = {
        status: "success"
    };

    try {
        var body = request.body.data;

        if (!body || !body.label || !body.name || !body.sys_id) {
            response.setStatus(400);
            return { status: "error", message: "Missing required fields" };
        }

        var tableSysId = body.sys_id;
		var tableName = body.name;
		var tableLabel = body.label;

        // STEP 1: Get the Table Name from the sys_id provided
        var tableDefGR = new GlideRecord('sys_db_object');
		tableDefGR.addQuery("sys_id", tableSysId);
		tableDefGR.addQuery("name", tableName);
		tableDefGR.addQuery("label", tableLabel);
		tableDefGR.query();
        if (tableDefGR.next()) {
			response.setStatus(200);
			return result;
        } else {
            response.setStatus(404);
            return { status: "error", message: "Table definition not found for the provided sys_id." };
        }

    } catch (e) {
        response.setStatus(400);
        return { status: "error", message: e.message };
    }
})(request, response);]]></operation_script><operation_uri>/api/x_xurrent_imr/xurrent_imr_connections/validate_entity_details</operation_uri><produces>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</produces><produces_customized>false</produces_customized><relative_path>/validate_entity_details</relative_path><request_example/><requires_acl_authorization>true</requires_acl_authorization><requires_authentication>true</requires_authentication><requires_snc_internal_role>true</requires_snc_internal_role><short_description/><sys_class_name>sys_ws_operation</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-26 08:39:41</sys_created_on><sys_id>d269daee933f3610dd07fd10ed03d6a3</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Validate Entity Details</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Xurrent IMR" source="x_xurrent_imr">99b1a1ff83762210b474b755eeaad3d0</sys_package><sys_policy>protected</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Xurrent IMR">99b1a1ff83762210b474b755eeaad3d0</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ws_operation_d269daee933f3610dd07fd10ed03d6a3</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-26 10:07:33</sys_updated_on><web_service_definition display_value="Xurrent IMR Connections">4e0565f383b62210b474b755eeaad3df</web_service_definition><web_service_version/></sys_ws_operation></record_update>
